headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.instagram.com https://connect.facebook.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https: https://www.instagram.com https://cdninstagram.com; frame-src https://www.instagram.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.instagram.com https://graph.instagram.com; object-src 'none';
